name: Allied Tecnologia S.A.
summary: Allied Tecnologia S.A., a technology company, operates in the consumer electronics market in Brazil. It engages in the retail sale of digital products through its stores, as well as online. It is also involved in the distribution of robotic vacuum cleaners, sockets, smart lamps, refrigerators, and washing machines. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil.
